full_text:
Wang Qi (Kongshuo) 王頎 (孔碩)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Qi (王頎), styledKongshuo (孔碩), was born in Donglai commandery. District Governor of Tianshui before helping Deng Ai’s invasion of Shu. Wang Qi was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty.
